title: Anti_chestESP
description: Anti_ChestESP is a Minecraft plugin that protects chests from being detected by ESP hacks, keeping your storage safe.
body:
Anti_ChestESP

Anti_ChestESP is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that prevents hacked clients from detecting player-placed chests with Chest ESP.
This plugin does not use packet manipulation — instead, it modifies the structure and visibility of protected chests in a way that makes them undetectable to ESP cheats, while keeping them fully functional for normal players.

How It Works

Anti_ChestESP changes the internal structure of player-placed chests so that ESP cheats cannot recognize them as chest blocks.
For regular players, these protected chests still behave exactly like normal chests and can be opened and used without any difference.

✔ No packet spoofing
✔ No gameplay changes for legitimate players
✔ Only protects chests placed by players
✔ Naturally generated chests (villages, dungeons, etc.) are not affected

Features

Blocks ESP detection for player-placed chests

Does not modify world generation

Compatible with survival, PvP, faction and SMP servers

No TPS impact

Optional resource pack for improved visuals

Player Commands
/chestesp on
/chestesp off
/chestesp status

Admin Commands (antichestesp.admin)
/chestesp reload
/chestesp stats
/chestesp cleanup
/chestesp help

Optional Resource Pack

An optional resource pack is included to visually enhance protected chests.
It is not required for the plugin to function.

Why Use Anti_ChestESP?

Prevents unfair ESP advantages

Protects secret bases and stored items

Does not alter naturally generated chests

Simple, effective, and server-friendly

Anti_ChestESP — Protect your player-placed chests from ESP hacks.
